title: Nice op modpack
description: A player for some players with poor configuration to get a good gaming experience, playing this package of mods will increase our FPS a lot, not too stuck, this package of many optimized mods consisted of, currently only version 1.20.1
body:
# An optimized and silky mod pack

**Mods included**：
  
<details>
<summary>Mod Details</summary>

- tr7zw's 3D skin layer / This mod can give our in-game skins a 3D feel.

-  Motschen's Blur+ / This mod allows us to have a fuzzy feeling inside our gaming backpack.

-  Ezzenix's Chat Animation [Smooth Chat] / can animate our chat bar.

-  dzwdz Chat Heads / Make the chat bar say that the person has his skin avatar in front of him.

-  isxander's Zoomify / is known as C-key amplification.

-  And jellysquid3's Sodium / This mod can give us a lot of FPS improvement.

-  FX Memory Leak Fix / This prevents in-game memory leaks.

-  YaLTeR's Mouse Tweaks / You don't need to keep clicking to get blocks and items in the game, you can press and hold to get them, which is convenient and fast.

-  FoundationGames' Enhanced Block Entities / Under a lot of blocks - (for example) chests don't make the FPS too low.

-  Coderbot's Iris Shaders / Allows us to use shaders.

-  bre2el's FPS Reduer / Prevent the performance of the computer from being hung in the background when not playing games.

-  tr7zw's Entity Culling / This mod makes invisible entities skip during rendering.

-  Motschen's Cull Leaves / This mod optimizes leaves to boost FPS for the original game.

-  FerriteCore by malte0811 / This mod reduces Minecraft's memory usage in a few different ways.

-  LazyDFU / by astei is an optimized mod for Minecraft, which postpones unnecessary initialization work so that it can only be executed when needed.

-  Noisium by Steveplays / Optimize the performance of the world generation process for a better gaming experience.

> There are also many authors who have expanded Sodium in terms of game settings

> The mod menu is a more intuitive way to see what mods are added to this mod pack.



</details>


A player for some players with poor configuration to get a good gaming experience, playing the mod of this pack will give us a lot of FPS improvement, not too stuck, this pack consists of a lot of optimized mods
For the survival of the player
